title: sorbus rivularis
intro: Sorbus rivularis, also known as the Chinese rowan or white rowan, is a deciduous shrub native to China and parts of Asia, belonging to the rose family and characterized by its white flowers and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Sorbus rivularis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of Sorbus rivularis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
